scripts.cf:db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply fitness_os_db --local
scripts.cf:db:migrate: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply fitness_os_db --remote
scripts.cf:pages:dev: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist --d1 DB=fitness_os_db
scripts.cf:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist
